message:
feat(mvcc,vfs): bind MVCC shared-memory header to live ShmRegion for cross-process TxnId and snapshot coordination

Previously, TransactionManager used in-process atomics for TxnId
allocation, snapshot visibility, and commit-seq tracking, which could
not coordinate across multiple OS processes sharing the same database
file. This change makes the MVCC SHM header a live region backed by
an ShmRegion, enabling true cross-process coordination.

SHM layout and region binding:
- Add NEXT_COMMIT_SEQ field to SHM header layout at offset 152
- Introduce open_region() and open_or_initialize_region() constructors
  that bind the header layout to a live ShmRegion
- Route all dynamic field operations (load/store/CAS/fetch_add) through
  dispatch helpers that use the mapped region when present, falling
  back to local atomics for in-memory-only connections

TransactionManager lifecycle changes:
- Bootstrap from SHM initial commit_seq and schema_epoch in new()
- Add with_shared_shm_region() constructor for shared-region binding
- begin() now allocates TxnIds from SHM (not local TxnManager)
- load_consistent_snapshot() reads from SHM seqlock instead of
  deriving from TxnManager counter
- Both commit paths call publish_shared_snapshot()
- Replace 1ms thread::sleep polling in serialized-writer drain with
  bounded spin+park handoff (SerializedDrainHandoff) using lock-table
  release_progress_epoch/wait_for_release_progress

Supporting infrastructure:
- Add release_progress_epoch() and wait_for_release_progress() to
  InProcessPageLockTable for aggregate lock-release notification
- Add borrow-based version accessors (with_visible_version,
  with_visible_and_chain_head_version, with_chain_head_version) to
  VersionStore, avoiding PageVersion/PageData cloning for rebase
- Refactor DRO loss matrix: extract dro_topology_pressure() and
  dro_cvar_penalty_from_pressure(), add topology-aware threshold
  tightening under contention with per-cell thresholds in DroLossMatrix
- Add atomic_load/store/fetch_add/compare_exchange_u64_le operations
  to ShmRegion, with heap-backed regions emulating through mutex and
  mmap-backed regions using native AtomicU64
- Add fsqlite-vfs dependency to fsqlite-mvcc Cargo.toml

Tests: live shared state between two layout handles, handoff park
cadence, deadline expiry, schedule summary bounds, DRO threshold
tightening, wake-on-release, timeout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
